top_signals.title: BOJ’s Ueda Reiterates Risk of Inflation Exceeding 2% Target
top_signals.summary: The Bank of Japan sees the risk of inflation exceeding its 2% target and will conduct additional interest-rate hikes appropriately, Governor Kazuo Ueda said in speech Wednesday that reiterated policymakers’ recent messaging.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: Meta announces new smart glasses starting at $299, as Zuckerberg keeps pushing wearables
top_signals.summary: Meta executives have said they see the lightweight smart glasses as a step towards a more advanced device that includes screens in the lenses.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Adani Bets on India Energy Security With Nuclear Power Project
top_signals.summary: Billionaire Gautam Adani said his giant conglomerate will embark on a new 10 gigawatt nuclear power initiative to help improve India’s energy security, in his first public speech since resolving his legal troubles in the US.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: New AbraSilver study quadruples Argentina project value
top_signals.summary: Diablillos is expected to generate an after-tax net present value of about $3 billion and a 42% internal rate of return.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.
